ValidationRule.description: At least 1 pilar has to be selected on the campaign (brand, thought leadership, expertise or product)
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT(OR( Brand__c , Thought_Leadership__c , Expertise__c , Product__c )), RecordType.Name = "Newsletters")
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You must select at least one pilar (Brand, Thought Leadership, Expertise, Product)
